texto: Television is a dirty business. To survive in it you have to be part weasel, part python, and part wolf. To succeed in it, you have to be 99.9 percent great white shark. The capacity for barefaced lying also comes in handy, particularly if you are freelance.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Matt Dickinson sobre temas ligados a humor. A afirmação “Television is a dirty business. To survive in it you have to be part weasel, part python, and par…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, sarcasm, television, útil em momentos de sarcasm.
